examples: The solubility of carbamazepine-saccharin cocrystal was determined by a static method basing on the principle of solubility product.
Some studies have linked saccharin to cancer in rodents.
Saccharin, the oldest artificial sweetener, was first produced in 1879.
If saccharin is removed from the carcinogen list, its warning label could be dropped as well.
Saccharin is an artifical sweetener that is 200 to 500 times sweeter than sugar.
